rationale: Educ. Code §48.0035 governs permissible uses of school district funding, not funding amounts or homestead exemption values. No direct textual conflict with increasing the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption.
quote: A school district may use funding to which the district is entitled under this chapter to:
_note: Indirect fiscal impact on school district revenue is possible but no direct conflict exists in the rule text.
